scripts.en: Hi! Nice to meet you. I'm a remote developer.
scripts.translation: Halo! Senang bertemu denganmu. Saya developer remote.

scripts.en: How are you doing today?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kabarmu hari ini?

scripts.en: I'm doing great, thanks! Just finished a sprint.
scripts.translation: Saya baik-baik saja, terima kasih! Baru selesai sprint.

scripts.en: Good morning! Ready for the standup?
scripts.translation: Selamat pagi! Siap untuk standup?

scripts.en: Long time no see! How's the new project?
scripts.translation: Lama tidak bertemu! Bagaimana project barunya?

scripts.en: It's going well! We're building a mobile app.
scripts.translation: Berjalan lancar! Kami sedang membangun aplikasi mobile.

scripts.en: See you at the next meeting!
scripts.translation: Sampai jumpa di pertemuan berikutnya!

scripts.en: What time zone are you in?
scripts.translation: Kamu di timezone berapa?

scripts.en: I'm in GMT+7, same as Jakarta.
scripts.translation: Saya di GMT+7, sama seperti Jakarta.

scripts.en: I work from home most days.
scripts.translation: Saya bekerja dari rumah kebanyakan hari.

scripts.en: What do you do for a living?
scripts.translation: Apa pekerjaan kamu?

scripts.en: I'm a full-stack developer working remotely.
scripts.translation: Saya full-stack developer yang bekerja remote.

scripts.en: My internet connection is unstable today.
scripts.translation: Koneksi internet saya tidak stabil hari ini.

scripts.en: Do you prefer working in the morning or evening?
scripts.translation: Kamu lebih suka kerja pagi atau malam?

scripts.en: I'm a night owl, so I code better after 8 PM.
scripts.translation: Saya orang malam, jadi saya lebih produktif coding setelah jam 8 malam.

scripts.en: Let me share my screen.
scripts.translation: Saya akan share layar saya.

scripts.en: Can you hear me okay?
scripts.translation: Apakah kamu bisa mendengar saya dengan jelas?

scripts.en: Yes, loud and clear.
scripts.translation: Ya, jelas sekali.

scripts.en: I need to grab a coffee, be right back.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu ambil kopi, sebentar ya.

scripts.en: I'm traveling to Bali for a tech conference.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pergi ke Bali untuk konferensi teknologi.

scripts.en: Where is the nearest coworking space?
scripts.translation: Di mana coworking space terdekat?

scripts.en: There's one about 10 minutes from here.
scripts.translation: Ada satu sekitar 10 menit dari sini.

scripts.en: I need to extend my hotel booking by two days.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu memperpanjang booking hotel dua hari.

scripts.en: Is the WiFi good at your hotel?
scripts.translation: Apakah WiFi bagus di hotel kamu?

scripts.en: Yes, it's fast enough for video calls.
scripts.translation: Ya, cukup cepat untuk video call.

scripts.en: I'll be working from a cafe today.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kerja dari cafe hari ini.

scripts.en: Can you recommend a good restaurant nearby?
scripts.translation: Bisa rekomendasi restoran bagus di sekitar sini?

scripts.en: Sure, there's a great warung on the corner.
scripts.translation: Tentu, ada warung bagus di pojokan.

scripts.en: Let's order lunch via GoFood.
scripts.translation: Ayo pesan makan siang lewat GoFood.

scripts.en: What kind of food do you like?
scripts.translation: Kamu suka makanan apa?

scripts.en: I love Indonesian food, especially nasi goreng.
scripts.translation: Saya suka makanan Indonesia, terutama nasi goreng.

scripts.en: I usually skip lunch when I'm deep in coding.
scripts.translation: Saya biasanya lewatkan makan siang saat sedang fokus coding.

scripts.en: Do you want to grab coffee after the meeting?
scripts.translation: Mau ngopi setelah meeting?

scripts.en: Sure! I know a great coffee shop nearby.
scripts.translation: Tentu! Saya tahu kedai kopi bagus di dekat sini.

scripts.en: The food here is delicious and affordable.
scripts.translation: Makanan di sini enak dan terjangkau.

scripts.en: Are you vegetarian?
scripts.translation: Kamu vegetarian?

scripts.en: No, but I'm trying to eat healthier.
scripts.translation: Tidak, tapi saya sedang mencoba makan lebih sehat.

scripts.en: I need to buy a new keyboard.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu membeli keyboard baru.

scripts.en: Where did you buy your standing desk?
scripts.translation: Di mana kamu beli meja berdiri kamu?

scripts.en: I ordered it from Tokopedia during the sale.
scripts.translation: Saya pesan dari Tokopedia saat diskon.

scripts.en: How much does a good monitor cost?
scripts.translation: Berapa harga monitor yang bagus?

scripts.en: Do you prefer mechanical or membrane keyboards?
scripts.translation: Kamu lebih suka keyboard mekanis atau membran?

scripts.en: I prefer mechanical with blue switches.
scripts.translation: Saya lebih suka mekanis dengan switch blue.

scripts.en: Let me check the reviews before buying.
scripts.translation: Saya cek ulasannya dulu sebelum beli.

scripts.en: Is there a warranty for this laptop?
scripts.translation: Apakah ada garansi untuk laptop ini?

scripts.en: Yes, it comes with a two-year warranty.
scripts.translation: Ya, sudah termasuk garansi dua tahun.

scripts.en: Let's kick off the meeting with a quick update.
scripts.translation: Ayo mulai meeting dengan update singkat.

scripts.en: Can everyone join the Zoom call?
scripts.translation: Bisakah semua orang join Zoom call?

scripts.en: I'm having audio issues, can you hear me now?
scripts.translation: Saya ada masalah audio, bisa dengar saya sekarang?

scripts.en: Let's table this discussion for the next meeting.
scripts.translation: Ayo tunda diskusi ini untuk meeting berikutnya.

scripts.en: Who will take the meeting minutes?
scripts.translation: Siapa yang akan mencatat hasil meeting?

scripts.en: I'll handle it. I'll share the notes on Slack.
scripts.translation: Saya yang tanggung. Saya akan bagikan catatannya di Slack.

scripts.en: Let's wrap up. Any final questions?
scripts.translation: Ayo tutup. Ada pertanyaan terakhir?

scripts.en: Can we schedule a follow-up for next week?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita jadwalkan follow-up minggu depan?

scripts.en: Sure, I'll send a calendar invite.
scripts.translation: Tentu, saya akan kirim undangan kalender.

scripts.en: What's your best rate for this project?
scripts.translation: Tarif terbaik kamu untuk project ini berapa?

scripts.en: We need to find a middle ground on the budget.
scripts.translation: Kita perlu menemukan titik tengah soal budget.

scripts.en: I understand. Let me propose a flexible plan.
scripts.translation: Saya mengerti. Saya usulkan rencana fleksibel.

scripts.en: That's below my minimum rate, unfortunately.
scripts.translation: Itu di bawah tarif minimum saya, sayangnya.

scripts.en: Can we offer equity instead of full payment?
scripts.translation: Bisa kami tawarkan ekuitas sebagai pengganti pembayaran penuh?

scripts.en: I'd prefer a mix of cash and equity.
scripts.translation: Saya lebih suka kombinasi cash dan ekuitas.

scripts.en: Let me think about it and get back to you.
scripts.translation: Biarkan saya pikirkan dan saya kabari nanti.

scripts.en: What's included in the scope of work?
scripts.translation: Apa yang termasuk dalam cakupan kerja?

scripts.en: Development, testing, and one month of support.
scripts.translation: Pengembangan, testing, dan satu bulan support.

scripts.en: Today I'll walk you through our tech stack.
scripts.translation: Hari ini saya akan menjelaskan tech stack kami.

scripts.en: Can you share the slide deck with the team?
scripts.translation: Bisa share slide deck ke tim?

scripts.en: Yes, I've uploaded it to Google Drive.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya sudah upload ke Google Drive.

scripts.en: Let me demo the new feature.
scripts.translation: Saya perlihatkan demo fitur baru.

scripts.en: What metrics will you be presenting?
scripts.translation: Metrik apa yang akan kamu presentasikan?

scripts.en: Revenue growth, user retention, and churn rate.
scripts.translation: Pertumbuhan pendapatan, retensi pengguna, dan churn rate.

scripts.en: Any questions before I move to the next slide?
scripts.translation: Ada pertanyaan sebelum saya lanjut ke slide berikutnya?

scripts.en: Your presentation was very clear, thank you.
scripts.translation: Presentasimu sangat jelas, terima kasih.

scripts.en: Thanks! I'll send the recording later.
scripts.translation: Terima kasih! Saya akan kirim rekamannya nanti.

scripts.en: What do you do for a living?
scripts.translation: Apa pekerjaan kamu?

scripts.en: I'm a freelance developer specializing in React.
scripts.translation: Saya developer freelance yang mengkhususkan diri di React.

scripts.en: That's great! I'm looking for someone with those skills.
scripts.translation: Bagus! Saya sedang mencari orang dengan keahlian itu.

scripts.en: Can I add you on LinkedIn?
scripts.translation: Boleh saya tambah di LinkedIn?

scripts.en: Do you attend any tech meetups?
scripts.translation: Kamu ikut tech meetup nggak?

scripts.en: Yes, I go to the Jakarta JS meetup every month.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya datang ke Jakarta JS meetup tiap bulan.

scripts.en: I'd love to collaborate on a project.
scripts.translation: Saya ingin berkolaborasi dalam suatu project.

scripts.en: Here's my business card.
scripts.translation: Ini kartu nama saya.

scripts.en: Thanks! I'll reach out to you on email.
scripts.translation: Terima kasih! Saya akan hubungi kamu lewat email.

scripts.en: I'll send you the project proposal by EOD.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim proposal project sebelum akhir hari.

scripts.en: Did you receive my email about the deadline?
scripts.translation: Apakah kamu menerima email saya tentang deadline?

scripts.en: Yes, I'll review it and reply by tomorrow.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya akan review dan balas besok.

scripts.en: Please find the attached invoice.
scripts.translation: Silakan lihat lampiran invoice.

scripts.en: Can you CC me on that email thread?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu CC saya di thread email itu?

scripts.en: Sure, I've added you to the CC list.
scripts.translation: Tentu, saya sudah tambahkan kamu ke CC.

scripts.en: Thanks for your prompt response.
scripts.translation: Terima kasih atas respon cepatnya.

scripts.en: I'm following up on my previous email.
scripts.translation: Saya follow up email saya sebelumnya.

scripts.en: Apologies for the late reply. Here's my feedback.
scripts.translation: Maaf atas keterlambatan balasan. Ini feedback saya.

scripts.en: I need to reconcile the monthly expenses.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu merekonsiliasi pengeluaran bulanan.

scripts.en: Can you send me the balance sheet?
scripts.translation: Bisa kirim saya balance sheet-nya?

scripts.en: I'll prepare it by end of business today.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan sebelum akhir hari kerja.

scripts.en: The profit and loss statement looks good.
scripts.translation: Laporan laba rugi terlihat bagus.

scripts.en: What's our accounts receivable balance?
scripts.translation: Berapa saldo accounts receivable kita?

scripts.en: It's approximately two million rupiah.
scripts.translation: Kurang lebih dua juta rupiah.

scripts.en: I'll need the invoices sorted by date.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu invoice diurutkan berdasarkan tanggal.

scripts.en: Did we close the books for last month?
scripts.translation: Sudahkah kita tutup buku bulan lalu?

scripts.en: Yes, everything has been reconciled.
scripts.translation: Ya, semuanya sudah direkonsiliasi.

scripts.en: I'm diversifying my investment portfolio.
scripts.translation: Saya sedang mendiversifikasi portofolio investasi saya.

scripts.en: Have you looked into index funds?
scripts.translation: Sudahkah kamu melihat reksa dana indeks?

scripts.en: Yes, I'm putting 30% of savings into them.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya alokasikan 30% tabungan ke situ.

scripts.en: The return on investment was impressive this quarter.
scripts.translation: Return on investment trimester ini mengesankan.

scripts.en: What's your risk tolerance?
scripts.translation: Seberapa besar toleransi risiko kamu?

scripts.en: I prefer low-risk investments at this point.
scripts.translation: Saya lebih suka investasi berisiko rendah saat ini.

scripts.en: Do you invest in stocks or crypto?
scripts.translation: Kamu investasi di saham atau crypto?

scripts.en: The stock market has been volatile lately.
scripts.translation: Pasar saham akhir-akhir ini volatil.

scripts.en: I'm holding long-term and not panicking.
scripts.translation: Saya hold jangka panjang dan tidak panik.

scripts.en: I need to transfer funds to my business account.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu mentransfer dana ke rekening bisnis saya.

scripts.en: Which bank do you use for your freelance income?
scripts.translation: Kamu pakai bank mana untuk penghasilan freelance?

scripts.en: I use Bank Mandiri for business and BCA for personal.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai Bank Mandiri untuk bisnis dan BCA untuk pribadi.

scripts.en: The international transfer takes 2-3 business days.
scripts.translation: Transfer internasional membutuhkan 2-3 hari kerja.

scripts.en: What's the exchange rate for USD to IDR today?
scripts.translation: Berapa kurs USD ke IDR hari ini?

scripts.en: It's around fifteen thousand per dollar.
scripts.translation: Sekitar lima belas ribu per dolar.

scripts.en: I'll set up automatic bill payments.
scripts.translation: Saya akan atur pembayaran tagihan otomatis.

scripts.en: Do you have a business credit line?
scripts.translation: Kamu punya credit line bisnis?

scripts.en: Yes, it helps with cash flow management.
scripts.translation: Ya, ini membantu manajemen arus kas.

scripts.en: I'm creating a monthly budget for my startup.
scripts.translation: Saya sedang membuat anggaran bulanan untuk startup saya.

scripts.en: What percentage of income goes to tools and software?
scripts.translation: Berapa persen penghasilan untuk tools dan software?

scripts.en: About 15% covers all my subscriptions.
scripts.translation: Sekitar 15% untuk semua langganan saya.

scripts.en: We need to cut costs somewhere.
scripts.translation: Kita perlu mengurangi biaya di suatu tempat.

scripts.en: How do you track your expenses?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu melacak pengeluaran?

scripts.en: I use a spreadsheet and update it weekly.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai spreadsheet dan update tiap minggu.

scripts.en: We're under budget this month, which is great.
scripts.translation: Kami di bawah anggaran bulan ini, bagus sekali.

scripts.en: Should we allocate more to marketing?
scripts.translation: Haruskah kita alokasikan lebih banyak ke marketing?

scripts.en: Yes, but only for high-ROI channels.
scripts.translation: Ya, tapi hanya untuk channel dengan ROI tinggi.

scripts.en: I'll prepare the quarterly financial report.
scripts.translation: Saya akan menyiapkan laporan keuangan trimester.

scripts.en: Can you break down the revenue by source?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu rincikan pendapatan berdasarkan sumber?

scripts.en: Freelance projects bring 60%, and SaaS is 40%.
scripts.translation: Proyek freelance membawa 60%, dan SaaS 40%.

scripts.en: The cash flow report is ready for review.
scripts.translation: Laporan arus kas sudah siap untuk direview.

scripts.en: What were our biggest expenses this quarter?
scripts.translation: Apa pengeluaran terbesar kami trimester ini?

scripts.en: Cloud hosting and contractor payments.
scripts.translation: Cloud hosting dan pembayaran kontraktor.

scripts.en: I'll include charts in the presentation.
scripts.translation: Saya akan sertakan grafik dalam presentasi.

scripts.en: When is the board meeting to discuss finances?
scripts.translation: Kapan rapat dewan untuk membahas keuangan?

scripts.en: It's scheduled for Friday at 10 AM.
scripts.translation: Dijadwalkan hari Jumat jam 10 pagi.

scripts.en: Let me check my calendar for availability.
scripts.translation: Saya cek kalender saya dulu untuk ketersediaan.

scripts.en: Can we reschedule the meeting to Thursday?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita reschedule meeting ke hari Kamis?

scripts.en: Thursday works for me. I'll update the invite.
scripts.translation: Kamis cocok untuk saya. Saya akan update undangannya.

scripts.en: I've blocked off 2-4 PM for focused work.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah blokir jam 2-4 sore untuk kerja fokus.

scripts.en: What time zone should we use for the meeting?
scripts.translation: Time zone mana yang harus kita pakai untuk meeting?

scripts.en: Let's use UTC to avoid confusion.
scripts.translation: Ayo pakai UTC agar tidak bingung.

scripts.en: I'll set up the recurring weekly sync.
scripts.translation: Saya akan atur sinkronisasi mingguan berulang.

scripts.en: Do you have any conflicts next week?
scripts.translation: Apakah kamu ada konflik minggu depan?

scripts.en: Wednesday afternoon is open for me.
scripts.translation: Rabu sore kosong untuk saya.

scripts.en: I've updated the project documentation.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah update dokumentasi project.

scripts.en: Where should we store the SOPs?
scripts.translation: Di mana kita simpan SOP-nya?

scripts.en: Let's keep them in the shared Google Drive.
scripts.translation: Ayo simpan di Google Drive bersama.

scripts.en: Please fill out the onboarding checklist.
scripts.translation: Silakan isi checklist onboarding.

scripts.en: I need the standard operating procedures.
scripts.translation: Saya butuh prosedur operasional standar.

scripts.en: I'll send you the link to our knowledge base.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim link ke knowledge base kami.

scripts.en: All contracts need to be filed digitally.
scripts.translation: Semua kontrak harus disimpan secara digital.

scripts.en: Can you sign the digital document via DocuSign?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tanda tangan dokumen digital lewat DocuSign?

scripts.en: Done! I've signed and returned it.
scripts.translation: Selesai! Saya sudah tanda tangan dan kembalikan.

scripts.en: I'll draft the response to the client.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat draft balasan untuk klien.

scripts.en: Can you CC the project manager on this email?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu CC project manager di email ini?

scripts.en: Done. I've also included the team lead.
scripts.translation: Selesai. Saya juga sudah sertakan team lead.

scripts.en: We need to send a formal letter of intent.
scripts.translation: Kita perlu mengirim surat niat resmi.

scripts.en: The client is asking for a status update.
scripts.translation: Klien meminta update status.

scripts.en: I'll prepare a summary and send it today.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan ringkasan dan kirim hari ini.

scripts.en: Please acknowledge receipt of this document.
scripts.translation: Silakan konfirmasi penerimaan dokumen ini.

scripts.en: We should follow up on the proposal.
scripts.translation: Kita harus follow up proposal-nya.

scripts.en: I'll send a polite reminder tomorrow.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim pengingat sopan besok.

scripts.en: All invoices are filed under the finance folder.
scripts.translation: Semua invoice disimpan di folder keuangan.

scripts.en: Can you organize the shared drive folders?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu atur folder di drive bersama?

scripts.en: I'll create a clear folder structure.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat struktur folder yang jelas.

scripts.en: Please scan and upload the signed contract.
scripts.translation: Silakan scan dan upload kontrak yang sudah ditandatangani.

scripts.en: How do you name your files for easy search?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu memberi nama file agar mudah dicari?

scripts.en: I use the format: date_client_project.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai format: tanggal_klien_project.

scripts.en: We need a backup system for critical files.
scripts.translation: Kita butuh sistem backup untuk file penting.

scripts.en: Are all the expense receipts archived?
scripts.translation: Apakah semua kuitansi pengeluaran sudah diarsipkan?

scripts.en: Yes, they're organized by month and category.
scripts.translation: Ya, sudah diorganisir berdasarkan bulan dan kategori.

scripts.en: The weekly status report is due on Friday.
scripts.translation: Laporan status mingguan harus selesai hari Jumat.

scripts.en: Can you compile the team's progress updates?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu kumpulkan update progres tim?

scripts.en: I'll gather the data from everyone's Slack updates.
scripts.translation: Saya akan ambil data dari update Slack semua orang.

scripts.en: I've submitted the monthly activity report.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah mengirim laporan aktivitas bulanan.

scripts.en: What format should the report follow?
scripts.translation: Format apa yang harus diikuti laporannya?

scripts.en: Use the standard template in the shared folder.
scripts.translation: Pakai template standar di folder bersama.

scripts.en: The KPI dashboard is updated in real-time.
scripts.translation: Dashboard KPI diperbarui secara real-time.

scripts.en: When is the quarterly review meeting?
scripts.translation: Kapan pertemuan review trimester?

scripts.en: It's next Monday at 9 AM.
scripts.translation: Senin depan jam 9 pagi.

scripts.en: I'll create the mockup in Figma.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat mockup di Figma.

scripts.en: Are you using Figma or Adobe XD for this project?
scripts.translation: Kamu pakai Figma atau Adobe XD untuk project ini?

scripts.en: I prefer Figma for its collaboration features.
scripts.translation: Saya lebih suka Figma untuk fitur kolaborasinya.

scripts.en: Let me export the assets in SVG format.
scripts.translation: Saya akan ekspor aset dalam format SVG.

scripts.en: Can you share the Figma prototype link?
scripts.translation: Bisa share link prototype Figma-nya?

scripts.en: Sure, I'll send the view-only link.
scripts.translation: Tentu, saya akan kirim link view-only.

scripts.en: I use Canva for quick social media designs.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai Canva untuk desain media sosial cepat.

scripts.en: What design system are you following?
scripts.translation: Design system apa yang kamu ikuti?

scripts.en: I'm building a custom design system in Figma.
scripts.translation: Saya sedang membangun design system custom di Figma.

scripts.en: I'll present the initial concepts on Friday.
scripts.translation: Saya akan presentasikan konsep awal hari Jumat.

scripts.en: What's your design process for a new project?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana proses desain kamu untuk project baru?

scripts.en: Research, wireframes, then high-fidelity mockups.
scripts.translation: Riset, wireframe, lalu mockup high-fidelity.

scripts.en: Let's schedule a walkthrough of the design.
scripts.translation: Ayo jadwalkan walkthrough desainnya.

scripts.en: Can you give me a timeline for the redesign?
scripts.translation: Bisa beri saya timeline untuk redesain?

scripts.en: About 3 weeks from concept to final delivery.
scripts.translation: Sekitar 3 minggu dari konsep ke pengiriman final.

scripts.en: I'll incorporate your feedback into the next revision.
scripts.translation: Saya akan masukkan feedback Anda ke revisi berikutnya.

scripts.en: The client wants a more modern look.
scripts.translation: Klien ingin tampilan yang lebih modern.

scripts.en: I'll update the style guide accordingly.
scripts.translation: Saya akan update style guide sesuai permintaan.

scripts.en: I need to update my portfolio website.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu update website portfolio saya.

scripts.en: What's the best way to showcase your work?
scripts.translation: Cara terbaik untuk memamerkan karya kamu?

scripts.en: I use case studies with before-and-after shots.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai studi kasus dengan foto sebelum dan sesudah.

scripts.en: I'll add the new project to my Behance page.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tambahkan project baru ke halaman Behance saya.

scripts.en: Do you include client testimonials in your portfolio?
scripts.translation: Kamu sertakan testimonial klien di portfolio?

scripts.en: Yes, social proof is very important.
scripts.translation: Ya, bukti sosial sangat penting.

scripts.en: My portfolio is hosted on Webflow.
scripts.translation: Portfolio saya dihost di Webflow.

scripts.en: How often should you update your portfolio?
scripts.translation: Seberapa sering kamu harus update portfolio?

scripts.en: I try to update it quarterly with new projects.
scripts.translation: Saya coba update tiap trimester dengan project baru.

scripts.en: Can you give me specific feedback on the layout?
scripts.translation: Bisa beri feedback spesifik tentang layout-nya?

scripts.en: The color palette feels a bit too bright.
scripts.translation: Palet warnanya terasa sedikit terlalu terang.

scripts.en: I'll tone it down and use softer tones.
scripts.translation: Saya akan redam dan pakai warna lebih lembut.

scripts.en: I'd suggest making the CTA button more prominent.
scripts.translation: Saya sarankan buat tombol CTA lebih menonjol.

scripts.en: The typography needs to be more readable.
scripts.translation: Tipografi perlu lebih mudah dibaca.

scripts.en: I'll increase the font size and line height.
scripts.translation: Saya akan perbesar ukuran font dan line height.

scripts.en: Your feedback has improved the design significantly.
scripts.translation: Feedback Anda telah meningkatkan desain secara signifikan.

scripts.en: What do you think about the spacing?
scripts.translation: Menurutmu bagaimana spacing-nya?

scripts.en: It looks great, nice use of white space.
scripts.translation: Terlihat bagus, penggunaan white space yang baik.

scripts.en: The design should be responsive across all devices.
scripts.translation: Desain harus responsif di semua perangkat.

scripts.en: What's the required screen resolution?
scripts.translation: Berapa resolusi layar yang dibutuhkan?

scripts.en: We need to support 1920x1080 down to 375px mobile.
scripts.translation: Kita harus mendukung 1920x1080 hingga 375px mobile.

scripts.en: Please follow the brand guidelines strictly.
scripts.translation: Silakan ikuti panduan brand secara ketat.

scripts.en: What file formats do you need for handoff?
scripts.translation: Format file apa yang kamu butuhkan untuk handoff?

scripts.en: SVG for icons and PNG for images.
scripts.translation: SVG untuk ikon dan PNG untuk gambar.

scripts.en: The accessibility standards must be WCAG 2.1 AA.
scripts.translation: Standar aksesibilitas harus WCAG 2.1 AA.

scripts.en: Does this need to integrate with a CMS?
scripts.translation: Apakah ini perlu terintegrasi dengan CMS?

scripts.en: Yes, the client wants WordPress integration.
scripts.translation: Ya, klien ingin integrasi WordPress.

scripts.en: Organic traffic increased by 25% this month.
scripts.translation: Traffic organik meningkat 25% bulan ini.

scripts.en: What does the Google Analytics data show?
scripts.translation: Apa data Google Analytics menunjukkan?

scripts.en: Bounce rate is down and session duration is up.
scripts.translation: Bounce rate turun dan durasi sesi naik.

scripts.en: I'll set up a custom dashboard in GA4.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat dashboard custom di GA4.

scripts.en: Which pages are getting the most traffic?
scripts.translation: Halaman mana yang mendapat traffic paling banyak?

scripts.en: The blog posts about tutorials perform best.
scripts.translation: Artikel blog tentang tutorial paling perform.

scripts.en: Let's track conversions from organic search.
scripts.translation: Ayo lacak konversi dari pencarian organik.

scripts.en: Can you pull the monthly SEO report?
scripts.translation: Bisa ambil laporan SEO bulanan?

scripts.en: It's ready. I'll share it on the dashboard.
scripts.translation: Sudah siap. Saya akan bagikan di dashboard.

scripts.en: We should target long-tail keywords for better ranking.
scripts.translation: Kita harus target keyword long-tail untuk ranking lebih baik.

scripts.en: What keyword research tools do you use?
scripts.translation: Tools riset keyword apa yang kamu pakai?

scripts.en: Ahrefs and Google Keyword Planner.
scripts.translation: Ahrefs dan Google Keyword Planner.

scripts.en: The keyword difficulty is too high for new sites.
scripts.translation: Kesulitan keyword terlalu tinggi untuk situs baru.

scripts.en: How many keywords should we target per page?
scripts.translation: Berapa banyak keyword yang harus kita target per halaman?

scripts.en: One primary keyword and 3-5 secondary ones.
scripts.translation: Satu keyword utama dan 3-5 keyword sekunder.

scripts.en: I'll optimize the meta descriptions with target keywords.
scripts.translation: Saya akan optimasi meta deskripsi dengan keyword target.

scripts.en: What's the search intent behind these keywords?
scripts.translation: Apa search intent di balik keyword-keyword ini?

scripts.en: Mostly informational and commercial intent.
scripts.translation: Kebanyakan intent informatif dan komersial.

scripts.en: The site needs a proper sitemap.xml.
scripts.translation: Situs butuh sitemap.xml yang benar.

scripts.en: Is the website loading fast enough?
scripts.translation: Apakah website cukup cepat dimuat?

scripts.en: Core Web Vitals are passing on all pages.
scripts.translation: Core Web Vitals lulus di semua halaman.

scripts.en: I'll fix the crawl errors in Search Console.
scripts.translation: Saya akan perbaiki error crawling di Search Console.

scripts.en: Do we need to implement structured data?
scripts.translation: Apakah kita perlu menerapkan structured data?

scripts.en: Yes, Article schema will help with rich snippets.
scripts.translation: Ya, schema Article akan membantu dengan rich snippet.

scripts.en: The site is now fully HTTPS with no mixed content.
scripts.translation: Situs sekarang sepenuhnya HTTPS tanpa mixed content.

scripts.en: Are there any broken links on the site?
scripts.translation: Apakah ada link rusak di situs?

scripts.en: I found 12 and I'm redirecting them now.
scripts.translation: Saya menemukan 12 dan saya sedang redirect sekarang.

scripts.en: I'll prepare the monthly SEO performance report.
scripts.translation: Saya akan menyiapkan laporan performa SEO bulanan.

scripts.en: What metrics should be included in the report?
scripts.translation: Metrik apa yang harus disertakan dalam laporan?

scripts.en: Traffic, rankings, backlinks, and conversions.
scripts.translation: Traffic, ranking, backlink, dan konversi.

scripts.en: We gained 15 new backlinks this month.
scripts.translation: Kita mendapatkan 15 backlink baru bulan ini.

scripts.en: How does our traffic compare to last month?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana traffic kita dibandingkan bulan lalu?

scripts.en: It's up 18% overall and 30% from organic.
scripts.translation: Naik 18% secara keseluruhan dan 30% dari organik.

scripts.en: The report is available on our shared Google Sheet.
scripts.translation: Laporan tersedia di Google Sheet bersama kami.

scripts.en: Can you visualize the data with charts?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu visualisasikan data dengan grafik?

scripts.en: I'll add line graphs and bar charts.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tambahkan grafik garis dan batang.

scripts.en: We need a content strategy for the blog.
scripts.translation: Kita butuh strategi konten untuk blog.

scripts.en: Should we focus on link building or content first?
scripts.translation: Harusnya kita fokus link building atau konten dulu?

scripts.en: Content first, then build links to it.
scripts.translation: Konten dulu, baru bangun link ke situ.

scripts.en: Let's create a topic cluster strategy.
scripts.translation: Ayo buat strategi topic cluster.

scripts.en: How often should we publish new content?
scripts.translation: Seberapa sering kita harus publish konten baru?

scripts.en: At least two quality articles per week.
scripts.translation: Minimal dua artikel berkualitas per minggu.

scripts.en: We should optimize existing content before creating new.
scripts.translation: Kita harus optimasi konten yang ada sebelum buat baru.

scripts.en: What's our main SEO goal for this quarter?
scripts.translation: Apa tujuan SEO utama kita trimester ini?

scripts.en: Increase organic traffic by 40% and rank top 5 for key terms.
scripts.translation: Tingkatkan traffic organik 40% dan ranking top 5 untuk kata kunci utama.

scripts.en: Can you share the design brief for the new brand?
scripts.translation: Bisa share design brief untuk brand baru?

scripts.en: What's the target audience for this design?
scripts.translation: Siapa target audiens untuk desain ini?

scripts.en: Young professionals aged 25-35.
scripts.translation: Profesional muda berusia 25-35 tahun.

scripts.en: I need more details about the project goals.
scripts.translation: Saya butuh detail lebih banyak tentang tujuan project.

scripts.en: Do you have any reference designs we like?
scripts.translation: Apakah ada desain referensi yang kita suka?

scripts.en: Yes, I've pinned some on our Pinterest board.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya sudah pin beberapa di papan Pinterest kami.

scripts.en: I'll start with mood boards based on the brief.
scripts.translation: Saya akan mulai dengan mood board berdasarkan brief.

scripts.en: What's the deadline for the first draft?
scripts.translation: Berapa deadline untuk draft pertama?

scripts.en: We need it by end of next week.
scripts.translation: Kita butuh akhir minggu depan.

scripts.en: I'll design a new logo for the company.
scripts.translation: Saya akan desain logo baru untuk perusahaan.

scripts.en: What feeling should the brand convey?
scripts.translation: Perasaan apa yang harus disampaikan brand?

scripts.en: Professional, trustworthy, and innovative.
scripts.translation: Profesional, terpercaya, dan inovatif.

scripts.en: I'll create a brand style guide.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat brand style guide.

scripts.en: Should the logo be minimalist or detailed?
scripts.translation: Apakah logo harus minimalis atau detail?

scripts.en: We prefer a clean, modern look.
scripts.translation: Kami lebih suka tampilan bersih dan modern.

scripts.en: The brand colors are blue and white.
scripts.translation: Warna brand adalah biru dan putih.

scripts.en: Can we see logo variations for different uses?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita lihat variasi logo untuk penggunaan berbeda?

scripts.en: I'll prepare versions for print and digital.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan versi untuk cetak dan digital.

scripts.en: I recommend using a sans-serif font for the UI.
scripts.translation: Saya sarankan pakai font sans-serif untuk UI.

scripts.en: What font pairings work well together?
scripts.translation: Pasangan font apa yang cocok bersama?

scripts.en: Montserrat for headings and Open Sans for body.
scripts.translation: Montserrat untuk judul dan Open Sans untuk body.

scripts.en: The line height should be 1.5 for readability.
scripts.translation: Line height harus 1.5 untuk keterbacaan.

scripts.en: Should we use web-safe fonts or custom ones?
scripts.translation: Harusnya kita pakai font web-safe atau custom?

scripts.en: Google Fonts for performance, custom for brand.
scripts.translation: Google Fonts untuk performa, custom untuk brand.

scripts.en: I'll set up a typography scale for consistency.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat skala tipografi untuk konsistensi.

scripts.en: The font size seems too small on mobile.
scripts.translation: Ukuran font sepertinya terlalu kecil di mobile.

scripts.en: I'll bump it up to at least 16px.
scripts.translation: Saya akan naikkan minimal 16px.

scripts.en: The color palette should match the brand identity.
scripts.translation: Palet warna harus sesuai dengan identitas brand.

scripts.en: What colors evoke trust and reliability?
scripts.translation: Warna apa yang memunculkan kepercayaan dan keandalan?

scripts.en: Blue is the most common choice for trust.
scripts.translation: Biru adalah pilihan paling umum untuk kepercayaan.

scripts.en: I'll use complementary colors for contrast.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pakai warna komplementer untuk kontras.

scripts.en: Are these colors accessible for color-blind users?
scripts.translation: Apakah warna ini aksesibel untuk pengguna buta warna?

scripts.en: I'll check the contrast ratio with a tool.
scripts.translation: Saya akan cek rasio kontras dengan tools.

scripts.en: I've created a 5-color palette for the design.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah buat palet 5 warna untuk desain.

scripts.en: Can we see how it looks in light and dark mode?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita lihat tampilan di light dan dark mode?

scripts.en: I'll prepare mockups for both themes.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan mockup untuk kedua tema.

scripts.en: I'll send the deliverables in the agreed formats.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim hasil kerja dalam format yang disepakati.

scripts.en: Can you provide the source files along with exports?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu berikan source file beserta ekspor?

scripts.en: Yes, I'll include AI, PSD, and SVG files.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya akan sertakan file AI, PSD, dan SVG.

scripts.en: I've completed the third revision as requested.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah selesaikan revisi ketiga sesuai permintaan.

scripts.en: How many revision rounds are included?
scripts.translation: Berapa ronde revisi yang termasuk?

scripts.en: Two rounds are standard, additional ones are charged.
scripts.translation: Dua ronde standar, yang lebih dikenakan biaya.

scripts.en: I'll watermark the preview images.
scripts.translation: Saya akan beri watermark pada gambar preview.

scripts.en: When will the final files be ready?
scripts.translation: Kapan file final akan siap?

scripts.en: I'll have everything ready by Wednesday.
scripts.translation: Saya akan selesaikan semuanya hari Rabu.

scripts.en: I'll do a rough cut first, then refine.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat rough cut dulu, lalu perbaiki.

scripts.en: Can you add some B-roll footage here?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tambahkan footage B-roll di sini?

scripts.en: Sure, I'll overlay it with the interview.
scripts.translation: Tentu, saya akan overlay dengan wawancara.

scripts.en: I need to color grade the footage.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu color grade footage-nya.

scripts.en: What's the desired look and feel?
scripts.translation: Tampilan dan nuansa yang diinginkan seperti apa?

scripts.en: Warm tones, cinematic feel.
scripts.translation: Nada hangat, nuansa sinematik.

scripts.en: The jump cuts need to be smoother.
scripts.translation: Jump cut-nya perlu lebih halus.

scripts.en: Can we add transitions between scenes?
scripts.translation: Bisa kita tambahkan transisi antar adegan?

scripts.en: I'll use subtle cross-dissolves.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pakai cross-dissolve yang halus.

scripts.en: What's the target length for the video?
scripts.translation: Panjang target video berapa?

scripts.en: The client wants a 3-minute promotional video.
scripts.translation: Klien ingin video promosi 3 menit.

scripts.en: I'll keep it punchy with strong visuals.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat padat dengan visual kuat.

scripts.en: I'll use the footage shot on location.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pakai footage yang diambil di lokasi.

scripts.en: Do you need the raw footage or edited clips?
scripts.translation: Kamu butuh footage mentah atau klip yang sudah diedit?

scripts.en: Raw footage gives me more flexibility.
scripts.translation: Footage mentah memberi saya lebih banyak fleksibilitas.

scripts.en: I'll add subtitles in English and Indonesian.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tambahkan subtitle dalam bahasa Inggris dan Indonesia.

scripts.en: What resolution should the final export be?
scripts.translation: Resolusi apa untuk ekspor final?

scripts.en: 4K for the main file, 1080p for social media.
scripts.translation: 4K untuk file utama, 1080p untuk media sosial.

scripts.en: I use a MacBook Pro for editing.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai MacBook Pro untuk editing.

scripts.en: Do you use an external hard drive for storage?
scripts.translation: Kamu pakai hard drive eksternal untuk penyimpanan?

scripts.en: Yes, I have a 4TB SSD for all my projects.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya punya SSD 4TB untuk semua project saya.

scripts.en: A good microphone is essential for quality audio.
scripts.translation: Mic yang bagus sangat penting untuk audio berkualitas.

scripts.en: What camera do you use for shooting?
scripts.translation: Kamera apa yang kamu pakai untuk syuting?

scripts.en: I use a Sony A7III for most projects.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai Sony A7III untuk kebanyakan project.

scripts.en: I have a dual monitor setup for efficient editing.
scripts.translation: Saya punya setup dual monitor untuk editing efisien.

scripts.en: How much RAM do you recommend for video editing?
scripts.translation: Berapa RAM yang kamu rekomendasikan untuk editing video?

scripts.en: At least 32GB for smooth 4K editing.
scripts.translation: Minimal 32GB untuk editing 4K yang lancar.

scripts.en: I primarily use Adobe Premiere Pro.
scripts.translation: Saya terutama pakai Adobe Premiere Pro.

scripts.en: Have you tried DaVinci Resolve for color grading?
scripts.translation: Sudah coba DaVinci Resolve untuk color grading?

scripts.en: Yes, it's excellent for color work.
scripts.translation: Ya, sangat bagus untuk pekerjaan warna.

scripts.en: I use After Effects for motion graphics.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai After Effects untuk motion graphics.

scripts.en: What plugins do you use for editing?
scripts.translation: Plugin apa yang kamu pakai untuk editing?

scripts.en: FilmConvert for color and Neat Video for denoising.
scripts.translation: FilmConvert untuk warna dan Neat Video untuk denoising.

scripts.en: I'll render the video in H.264 for compatibility.
scripts.translation: Saya akan render video dalam H.264 untuk kompatibilitas.

scripts.en: Do you use proxy editing for large files?
scripts.translation: Kamu pakai proxy editing untuk file besar?

scripts.en: Yes, it makes the editing process much smoother.
scripts.translation: Ya, membuat proses editing jauh lebih lancar.

scripts.en: I'll upload the final video to Google Drive.
scripts.translation: Saya akan upload video final ke Google Drive.

scripts.en: What format should the final deliverable be?
scripts.translation: Format apa yang harus untuk hasil akhir?

scripts.en: MP4 H.264 with AAC audio.
scripts.translation: MP4 H.264 dengan audio AAC.

scripts.en: I'll create separate versions for social platforms.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat versi terpisah untuk platform sosial.

scripts.en: Do you provide a preview before final delivery?
scripts.translation: Kamu berikan preview sebelum pengiriman final?

scripts.en: Yes, I'll share a watermarked preview first.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya akan share preview dengan watermark dulu.

scripts.en: The final file will be delivered via WeTransfer.
scripts.translation: File final akan dikirim via WeTransfer.

scripts.en: Can you compress the file without losing quality?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu kompres file tanpa kehilangan kualitas?

scripts.en: I'll optimize the bitrate for the best balance.
scripts.translation: Saya akan optimasi bitrate untuk keseimbangan terbaik.

scripts.en: I'll sort your inbox by priority.
scripts.translation: Saya akan urutkan inbox Anda berdasarkan prioritas.

scripts.en: Can you draft a response to this client email?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu buat draft balasan untuk email klien ini?

scripts.en: Sure, I'll have it ready in 10 minutes.
scripts.translation: Tentu, saya akan selesaikan dalam 10 menit.

scripts.en: I've filtered the emails into categories.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah filter email ke dalam kategori.

scripts.en: How many unread emails do I have?
scripts.translation: Berapa banyak email belum dibaca saya?

scripts.en: There are 23 unread, but only 5 need action.
scripts.translation: Ada 23 belum dibaca, tapi hanya 5 yang perlu tindakan.

scripts.en: I'll set up email filters to reduce spam.
scripts.translation: Saya akan atur filter email untuk kurangi spam.

scripts.en: Can you follow up on the pending replies?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu follow up balasan yang tertunda?

scripts.en: Done, I've sent follow-ups to 3 contacts.
scripts.translation: Selesai, saya sudah kirim follow-up ke 3 kontak.

scripts.en: I'll manage your Google Calendar.
scripts.translation: Saya akan mengelola Google Calendar Anda.

scripts.en: Do I have any meetings tomorrow?
scripts.translation: Apakah saya ada meeting besok?

scripts.en: You have two: a standup at 9 AM and a client call at 2 PM.
scripts.translation: Anda punya dua: standup jam 9 pagi dan panggilan klien jam 2 sore.

scripts.en: I've blocked your focus time from 10-12.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah blokir waktu fokus Anda dari jam 10-12.

scripts.en: Can you schedule a meeting with the developer?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu jadwalkan meeting dengan developer?

scripts.en: Sure, what time works best for you?
scripts.translation: Tentu, jam berapa yang paling cocok untuk Anda?

scripts.en: I'll send calendar invites for all meetings.
scripts.translation: Saya akan kirim undangan kalender untuk semua meeting.

scripts.en: I need to reschedule my afternoon meetings.
scripts.translation: Saya perlu reschedule meeting sore saya.

scripts.en: I'll move them to next week.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pindahkan ke minggu depan.

scripts.en: I'll input all the contact information.
scripts.translation: Saya akan masukkan semua informasi kontak.

scripts.en: Can you update the customer database?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu update database pelanggan?

scripts.en: I'll add the 50 new entries today.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tambahkan 50 entri baru hari ini.

scripts.en: I'll double-check all the data for accuracy.
scripts.translation: Saya akan periksa ulang semua data untuk akurasi.

scripts.en: How fast can you enter these records?
scripts.translation: Seberapa cepat kamu bisa masukkan catatan ini?

scripts.en: I can handle about 200 entries per hour.
scripts.translation: Saya bisa handle sekitar 200 entri per jam.

scripts.en: The spreadsheet has been updated.
scripts.translation: Spreadsheet sudah diupdate.

scripts.en: Can you transfer this data to our CRM?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu transfer data ini ke CRM kami?

scripts.en: Yes, I'll import it via CSV.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya akan import lewat CSV.

scripts.en: I'll respond to customer inquiries promptly.
scripts.translation: Saya akan merespons pertanyaan pelanggan dengan cepat.

scripts.en: Can you handle the live chat support?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tangani live chat support?

scripts.en: Yes, I'll monitor it during business hours.
scripts.translation: Ya, saya akan pantau selama jam kerja.

scripts.en: I've created FAQ templates for common questions.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah buat template FAQ untuk pertanyaan umum.

scripts.en: How do you handle difficult customers?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu menangani pelanggan yang sulit?

scripts.en: I stay calm, listen actively, and offer solutions.
scripts.translation: Saya tetap tenang, mendengarkan aktif, dan tawarkan solusi.

scripts.en: All tickets have been resolved.
scripts.translation: Semua tiket sudah diselesaikan.

scripts.en: What's our average response time?
scripts.translation: Berapa waktu respons rata-rata kita?

scripts.en: It's under 2 hours, which is great.
scripts.translation: Di bawah 2 jam, yang sangat bagus.

scripts.en: I'll schedule posts on all platforms.
scripts.translation: Saya akan jadwalkan postingan di semua platform.

scripts.en: Can you create content for our Instagram?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu buat konten untuk Instagram kami?

scripts.en: I'll prepare a week's worth of content.
scripts.translation: Saya akan siapkan konten untuk satu minggu.

scripts.en: I'll respond to comments and DMs.
scripts.translation: Saya akan merespons komentar dan DM.

scripts.en: What posting schedule do you recommend?
scripts.translation: Jadwal posting apa yang kamu rekomendasikan?

scripts.en: Daily on Instagram, 3 times a week on LinkedIn.
scripts.translation: Tiap hari di Instagram, 3 kali seminggu di LinkedIn.

scripts.en: I'll use Buffer to manage all accounts.
scripts.translation: Saya akan pakai Buffer untuk mengelola semua akun.

scripts.en: Can you track our social media analytics?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu lacak analitik media sosial kami?

scripts.en: I'll provide a weekly report with key metrics.
scripts.translation: Saya akan berikan laporan mingguan dengan metrik kunci.

scripts.en: I'll write compelling sales copy for the landing page.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis sales copy yang menarik untuk landing page.

scripts.en: What's the main benefit of this product?
scripts.translation: Apa manfaat utama produk ini?

scripts.en: It saves developers 10 hours per week.
scripts.translation: Ini menghemat waktu developer 10 jam per minggu.

scripts.en: The headline needs to grab attention immediately.
scripts.translation: Headline harus menarik perhatian segera.

scripts.en: Can you write a call to action that converts?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tulis call to action yang mengkonversi?

scripts.en: I'll A/B test a few variations.
scripts.translation: Saya akan A/B test beberapa variasi.

scripts.en: I'll focus on pain points and solutions.
scripts.translation: Saya akan fokus pada titik masalah dan solusi.

scripts.en: What tone should the sales copy have?
scripts.translation: Nada apa yang harus dimiliki sales copy?

scripts.en: Professional but approachable.
scripts.translation: Profesional tapi mudah didekati.

scripts.en: I'll optimize the landing page for conversions.
scripts.translation: Saya akan optimasi landing page untuk konversi.

scripts.en: What elements should a high-converting page have?
scripts.translation: Elemen apa yang harus dimiliki halaman konversi tinggi?

scripts.en: Strong headline, social proof, and clear CTA.
scripts.translation: Headline kuat, bukti sosial, dan CTA jelas.

scripts.en: The hero section needs a powerful value proposition.
scripts.translation: Bagian hero butuh value proposition yang kuat.

scripts.en: Should we include testimonials on the page?
scripts.translation: Haruskah kita sertakan testimonial di halaman?

scripts.en: Absolutely, they build trust immediately.
scripts.translation: Pasti, mereka membangun kepercayaan segera.

scripts.en: I'll write the copy above the fold.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis copy di atas fold.

scripts.en: How long should the landing page be?
scripts.translation: Seberapa panjang landing page seharusnya?

scripts.en: Long enough to address all objections.
scripts.translation: Cukup panjang untuk mengatasi semua keberatan.

scripts.en: I'll create an email drip campaign.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat kampanye email drip.

scripts.en: What's a good subject line for high open rates?
scripts.translation: Apa subject line yang bagus untuk open rate tinggi?

scripts.en: Keep it short, personal, and curiosity-driven.
scripts.translation: Buat singkat, personal, dan memancing rasa penasaran.

scripts.en: I'll segment the email list for targeted messaging.
scripts.translation: Saya akan segmentasi daftar email untuk pesan yang terarah.

scripts.en: How many emails should we send per week?
scripts.translation: Berapa banyak email yang harus kita kirim per minggu?

scripts.en: Two to three is the sweet spot.
scripts.translation: Dua hingga tiga adalah titik ideal.

scripts.en: I'll write a welcome sequence for new subscribers.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis urutan sambutan untuk subscriber baru.

scripts.en: Can you A/B test the email templates?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu A/B test template email?

scripts.en: I'll test subject lines and CTA placement.
scripts.translation: Saya akan test subject line dan penempatan CTA.

scripts.en: I'll write engaging captions for Instagram.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis caption menarik untuk Instagram.

scripts.en: What kind of content performs best on LinkedIn?
scripts.translation: Jenis konten apa yang paling perform di LinkedIn?

scripts.en: Thought leadership posts with actionable tips.
scripts.translation: Postingan pemimpin pemikiran dengan tips yang bisa dipraktikkan.

scripts.en: I'll create a content calendar for the month.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat content calendar untuk bulan ini.

scripts.en: Should we use hashtags in our posts?
scripts.translation: Haruskah kita pakai hashtag di postingan?

scripts.en: Yes, but only relevant ones, about 5-10.
scripts.translation: Ya, tapi hanya yang relevan, sekitar 5-10.

scripts.en: I'll write thread content for Twitter/X.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis konten thread untuk Twitter/X.

scripts.en: Can you write viral-worthy copy?
scripts.translation: Bisa kamu tulis copy yang layak viral?

scripts.en: I'll write hooks that stop the scroll.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis hook yang bikin orang berhenti scroll.

scripts.en: I'll write ad copy for Google Ads.
scripts.translation: Saya akan tulis copy iklan untuk Google Ads.

scripts.en: What's the character limit for Google Ads?
scripts.translation: Berapa batas karakter untuk Google Ads?

scripts.en: Headlines are 30 characters, descriptions 90.
scripts.translation: Headline 30 karakter, deskripsi 90 karakter.

scripts.en: I'll create Facebook ad variations for A/B testing.
scripts.translation: Saya akan buat variasi iklan Facebook untuk A/B testing.

scripts.en: How do we write ads that convert?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kita tulis iklan yang mengkonversi?

scripts.en: Focus on benefits, use urgency, and clear CTA.
scripts.translation: Fokus pada manfaat, gunakan urgensi, dan CTA jelas.

scripts.en: I'll optimize the ad copy based on performance.
scripts.translation: Saya akan optimasi copy iklan berdasarkan performa.

scripts.en: What's our target cost per click?
scripts.translation: Berapa target cost per click kita?

scripts.en: We're aiming for under 5,000 rupiah per click.
scripts.translation: Kami mentok di bawah 5.000 rupiah per klik.

scripts.en: Hi, I'm Cecep Azhar — a full-stack developer specializing in Go, HTMX, and AI agent systems.
scripts.translation: Hai, saya Cecep Azhar — full-stack developer spesialisasi Go, HTMX, dan sistem AI agent.

scripts.en: I help businesses automate workflows and build scalable web platforms.
scripts.translation: Saya bantu bisnis otomasi alur kerja dan bangun platform web scalable.

scripts.en: I've delivered 6+ products across 3 countries, available for new projects.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah deliver 6+ produk di 3 negara, tersedia untuk proyek baru.

scripts.en: Hi, my name is Cecep Azhar. I'm a full-stack developer from Indonesia with X years of experience.
scripts.translation: Hai, nama saya Cecep Azhar. Saya full-stack developer dari Indonesia dengan pengalaman X tahun.

scripts.en: My primary stack is Go with Echo, HTMX for frontend, and PostgreSQL.
scripts.translation: Stack utama saya Go dengan Echo, HTMX untuk frontend, dan PostgreSQL.

scripts.en: I've been building AI agent systems that automate customer support and workflows.
scripts.translation: Saya membangun sistem AI agent yang otomasi customer support dan alur kerja.

scripts.en: I run FathForce — we go from solo developer to a full agency powered by AI.
scripts.translation: Saya jalankan FathForce — dari developer solo jadi agensi penuh didukung AI.

scripts.en: What do you do?
scripts.translation: Apa yang kamu kerjakan?

scripts.en: I build web apps and AI-powered tools for businesses.
scripts.translation: Saya bangun aplikasi web dan tools AI untuk bisnis.

scripts.en: What's your tech stack?
scripts.translation: Apa tech stack kamu?

scripts.en: Go, Echo, HTMX, Tailwind, PostgreSQL, LLM-based AI agents.
scripts.translation: Go, Echo, HTMX, Tailwind, PostgreSQL, AI agent berbasis LLM.

scripts.en: How long have you been doing this?
scripts.translation: Sudah berapa lama?

scripts.en: Over X years, focused on Go and AI for the past few.
scripts.translation: Lebih dari X tahun, fokus Go dan AI beberapa tahun terakhir.

scripts.en: What projects have you worked on?
scripts.translation: Proyek apa yang pernah dikerjakan?

scripts.en: SaaS, e-commerce, WhatsApp bots, and custom AI agents.
scripts.translation: SaaS, e-commerce, WhatsApp bot, dan AI agent custom.

scripts.en: Are you freelance?
scripts.translation: Kamu freelance?

scripts.en: I run my own agency. Also available for consulting.
scripts.translation: Saya punya agensi sendiri. Juga tersedia konsultasi.

scripts.en: Tell me about yourself.
scripts.translation: Ceritakan tentang diri kamu.

scripts.en: I'm a full-stack dev with X years specializing in Go, PostgreSQL, HTMX, and recently AI agent systems.
scripts.translation: Saya full-stack dev X tahun spesialisasi Go, PostgreSQL, HTMX, dan terakhir sistem AI agent.

scripts.en: Why should we hire you?
scripts.translation: Kenapa kami harus hire kamu?

scripts.en: I bring end-to-end capability — DB design to deployment. I ship fast and communicate clearly.
scripts.translation: Saya punya kemampuan end-to-end — desain DB sampai deployment. Cepat deliver, komunikasi jelas.

scripts.en: What's your strength?
scripts.translation: Apa kelebihan kamu?

scripts.en: I'm pragmatic — ship working software over over-engineering. Pick the right tools.
scripts.translation: Saya pragmatis — deliver software yang works daripada over-engineering. Pilih tools tepat.

scripts.en: What's your weakness?
scripts.translation: Apa kelemahan kamu?

scripts.en: I sometimes over-optimize before validation. I've learned to ship first, optimize later.
scripts.translation: Kadang over-optimize sebelum validasi. Saya sudah belajar deliver dulu, optimasi belakangan.

scripts.en: Tell me about a challenging project.
scripts.translation: Ceritakan proyek yang menantang.

scripts.en: Multi-tenant SaaS, 10K+ daily users. Challenge: data isolation plus real-time. Solution: connection pooling, Redis, HTMX.
scripts.translation: SaaS multi-tenant, 10K+ user per hari. Tantangan: isolasi data dan real-time. Solusi: pooling, Redis, HTMX.

scripts.en: How do you handle tight deadlines?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana kamu handle deadline ketat?

scripts.en: Break into small deliverables, prioritize MVP, communicate early if blocked.
scripts.translation: Pecah jadi deliverable kecil, prioritaskan MVP, komunikasi awal kalau blocked.

scripts.en: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
scripts.translation: Di mana kamu dalam 5 tahun?

scripts.en: Leading AI-powered product architecture. Bridging traditional software engineering with AI revolution.
scripts.translation: Memimpin arsitektur produk AI. Menjembatani SE tradisional dengan revolusi AI.

scripts.en: What's your salary expectation?
scripts.translation: Berapa ekspektasi gaji kamu?

scripts.en: $2,500 to $3,500 per month full-time, or $50 to $80 per hour contract.
scripts.translation: $2,500 sampai $3,500 per bulan full-time, atau $50 sampai $80 per jam kontrak.

scripts.en: Could you clarify the constraints? Speed, memory, or readability?
scripts.translation: Bisa jelaskan constraint-nya? Kecepatan, memori, atau keterbacaan?

scripts.en: Let me think. I'd identify the bottleneck, then compare approach A vs B.
scripts.translation: Saya pikirkan. Saya identifikasi bottleneck, lalu bandingkan pendekatan A vs B.

scripts.en: Haven't used that library, but the concept is similar to X. I can learn quickly.
scripts.translation: Belum pakai library itu, tapi konsepnya mirip X. Saya bisa cepat belajar.

scripts.en: Summary: I'd use X because of the reason. Does that align?
scripts.translation: Ringkasan: Saya pakai X karena alasan. Sesuai?

scripts.en: Can you walk me through your recent projects?
scripts.translation: Bisa ceritakan proyek terakhir kamu?

scripts.en: My flagship project is GCC — all-in-one business platform with Go, Echo, HTMX, PostgreSQL. Handles CRM, project management, and AI capabilities for 200+ users.
scripts.translation: Proyek unggulan saya GCC — platform bisnis all-in-one dengan Go, Echo, HTMX, PostgreSQL. Handle CRM, manajemen proyek, dan AI untuk 200+ pengguna.

scripts.en: I also built FathStore headless e-commerce, ProTool internal dashboards, and several AI agents for customer support using LLMs and RAG pipelines.
scripts.translation: Saya juga bangun FathStore e-commerce headless, ProTool dashboard internal, dan beberapa AI agent untuk customer support pakai LLM dan RAG.

scripts.en: I'm proud that I reduced page load from 3.2 seconds to under 800 milliseconds by switching from React to HTMX and optimizing DB queries.
scripts.translation: Saya bangga bisa kurangi page load dari 3,2 detik jadi di bawah 800 milidetik dengan migrasi React ke HTMX dan optimasi query DB.

scripts.en: What are your key strengths?
scripts.translation: Apa kekuatan utama kamu?

scripts.en: First, fast learner — I went from zero to production AI agents in 6 weeks. Second, pragmatic — Go for performance, HTMX for simplicity. Third, full-stack solo — DB to Docker to Cloudflare, very efficient for small teams.
scripts.translation: Pertama, cepat belajar — dari nol sampai AI agent production dalam 6 minggu. Kedua, pragmatis — Go untuk performa, HTMX untuk kesederhanaan. Ketiga, full-stack solo — DB sampai Docker sampai Cloudflare, sangat efisien untuk tim kecil.

scripts.en: What's your biggest weakness?
scripts.translation: Apa kelemahan terbesar kamu?

scripts.en: I tend to take on too many things — because I can do full-stack, I try to handle everything myself. I'm improving by delegating and building a small team. Also, I sometimes over-optimize before validation. Now I ship first, optimize later.
scripts.translation: Saya cenderung ambil terlalu banyak — karena bisa full-stack, saya coba handle sendiri semua. Saya perbaiki dengan delegasi dan bangun tim kecil. Juga, kadang over-optimize sebelum validasi. Sekarang deliver dulu, optimasi belakangan.

scripts.en: What are your salary expectations?
scripts.translation: Berapa ekspektasi gaji kamu?

scripts.en: Based on my SaaS experience, AI skills, and Go expertise, I'm looking at $2,500 to $3,500 per month.
scripts.translation: Berdasarkan pengalaman SaaS, keahlian AI, dan keahlian Go, saya minta $2,500 sampai $3,500 per bulan.

scripts.en: That's above our budget. We were thinking around $2,000.
scripts.translation: Itu di atas budget kami. Kami berpikir sekitar $2,000.

scripts.en: I understand. However, I handle full-stack alone — backend, frontend, DB, DevOps, AI — no extra hires needed. The cost savings are significant.
scripts.translation: Saya paham. Tapi saya handle full-stack sendiri — backend, frontend, DB, DevOps, AI — tanpa rekrut tambahan. Penghematannya signifikan.

scripts.en: Could we start at $2,000 with a review after 3 months based on performance? If I deliver, we adjust to $2,500.
scripts.translation: Bisa mulai $2,000 dengan review setelah 3 bulan berdasarkan performa? Kalau saya deliver, kita naikkan ke $2,500.

scripts.en: That works. $2,000 starting, performance review at 3 months.
scripts.translation: Oke. Mulai $2,000, review performa di 3 bulan.

scripts.en: Great. Can we document this in the offer letter?
scripts.translation: Bagus. Bisa didokumentasikan di offer letter?

scripts.en: What's your hourly rate?
scripts.translation: Berapa tarif per jam kamu?

scripts.en: $50 per hour. For longer engagement, 3 months or more, I can do $45 per hour. Or monthly retainer of $2,000 for up to 50 hours.
scripts.translation: $50 per jam. Untuk kontrak panjang, 3 bulan atau lebih, bisa $45 per jam. Atau retainer bulanan $2,000 untuk maksimal 50 jam.

scripts.en: My minimum for this type of work is $2,000 per month.
scripts.translation: Minimum saya $2,000 per bulan.

scripts.en: This reflects my X years and specialized Go plus AI skills.
scripts.translation: Ini mencerminkan X tahun dan keahlian Go plus AI saya.

scripts.en: My standard is $80 per hour, but I'm flexible for the right opportunity.
scripts.translation: Standar saya $80 per jam, tapi fleksibel untuk peluang tepat.

scripts.en: I include docs, deployment, and 30-day post-launch support.
scripts.translation: Saya sertakan dokumentasi, deployment, dan support 30 hari pasca-launch.

scripts.en: That's below my minimum. I need at least $2,000.
scripts.translation: Itu di bawah minimum saya. Saya butuh minimal $2,000.

scripts.en: I agree.
scripts.translation: Saya setuju.

scripts.en: I will deploy.
scripts.translation: Saya akan deploy.

scripts.en: I have a lot of experience.
scripts.translation: Saya punya banyak pengalaman.

scripts.en: Explain it to me.
scripts.translation: Jelaskan ke saya.

scripts.en: I have been working since 2020.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah kerja sejak 2020.

scripts.en: Discuss it.
scripts.translation: Bahas itu.

scripts.en: I'll get back to you.
scripts.translation: Saya balas kamu.

scripts.en: Handle this.
scripts.translation: Handle ini.

scripts.en: I have built 6 products.
scripts.translation: Saya sudah bangun 6 produk.

scripts.en: I worked at Company X from 2020 to 2023.
scripts.translation: Saya kerja di Company X dari 2020 sampai 2023.

scripts.en: Rolling out new feature tomorrow.
scripts.translation: Deploy fitur baru besok.

scripts.en: Build broke down after commit.
scripts.translation: Build gagal setelah commit.

scripts.en: Figured out the race condition.
scripts.translation: Sudah pecahkan race condition.

scripts.en: I'll look into the memory leak.
scripts.translation: Saya investigasi memory leak.

scripts.en: Hand off to ops team.
scripts.translation: Transfer ke tim ops.

scripts.en: Came up with better architecture.
scripts.translation: Ciptakan arsitektur yang lebih baik.

scripts.en: Good morning everyone. Thank you for joining.
scripts.translation: Selamat pagi semua. Terima kasih sudah bergabung.

scripts.en: Today I'll cover three main areas.
scripts.translation: Hari ini saya bahas 3 area utama.

scripts.en: Now let's move on to performance results.
scripts.translation: Sekarang lanjut ke hasil performa.

scripts.en: In simple terms, the server responds 3 times faster.
scripts.translation: Dalam istilah sederhana, server merespon 3 kali lebih cepat.

scripts.en: Think of it as a cache between app and database.
scripts.translation: Anggap sebagai cache antara aplikasi dan database.

scripts.en: Let me show you how this works in practice.
scripts.translation: Saya tunjukkan bagaimana ini bekerja.

scripts.en: To wrap up, here are the key takeaways.
scripts.translation: Untuk menutup, ini poin pentingnya.

scripts.en: Happy to take questions. I'll follow up on anything I can't answer now.
scripts.translation: Senang jawab pertanyaan. Saya follow up yang belum bisa dijawab sekarang.

scripts.en: On track. API complete, frontend 80% done.
scripts.translation: On track. API selesai, frontend 80%.

scripts.en: 3 days behind due to auth integration.
scripts.translation: Terlambat 3 hari karena integrasi auth.

scripts.en: Blocked on X. Need API keys from client.
scripts.translation: Blocked di X. Butuh API key dari klien.

scripts.en: Ahead of schedule. Can pull forward the feature.
scripts.translation: Lebih cepat. Bisa majukan fitur.

scripts.en: Completed 12 out of 15 story points this sprint.
scripts.translation: Selesaikan 12 dari 15 story point sprint ini.

scripts.en: What went well: CI/CD cut deploy time by 60%.
scripts.translation: Yang baik: CI/CD potong waktu deploy 60%.

scripts.en: To improve: test coverage at 45%, target 70%.
scripts.translation: Perbaikan: test coverage 45%, target 70%.

scripts.en: Great error logging — very thorough.
scripts.translation: Error logging bagus — sangat lengkap.

scripts.en: Suggestion: extract logic into reusable service.
scripts.translation: Saran: ekstrak logika jadi service reusable.

scripts.en: I'll own the task, ready by Thursday.
scripts.translation: Saya ambil task, siap Kamis.

scripts.en: Let's circle back Friday.
scripts.translation: Mari follow up Jumat.

scripts.en: What pain points are you trying to solve?
scripts.translation: Masalah apa yang ingin dipecahkan?

scripts.en: Here's my proposal for the initial scope.
scripts.translation: Ini usulan saya untuk scope awal.

scripts.en: For this complexity: $5,000, timeline 6 weeks.
scripts.translation: Untuk kompleksitas ini: $5,000, timeline 6 minggu.

scripts.en: Great idea. Let's add that as Phase 2.
scripts.translation: Ide bagus. Tambah Fase 2.

scripts.en: Friendly reminder — Invoice number X was due on the date.
scripts.translation: Reminder — Invoice nomor X jatuh tempo tanggal.

scripts.en: Need at least X weeks for quality delivery.
scripts.translation: Butuh minimal X minggu untuk kualitas baik.

scripts.en: All deliverables complete. Here's the checklist.
scripts.translation: Semua deliverable selesai. Ini checklist.

scripts.en: I offer 30-day post-launch support.
scripts.translation: Saya tawarkan support 30 hari pasca-launch.

scripts.en: Would you provide a testimonial?
scripts.translation: Bisa kasih testimoni?

scripts.en: We found your profile. Interested in remote work?
scripts.translation: Kami temukan profil kamu. Tertarik kerja remote?

scripts.en: Absolutely! Working remotely for X years with clients in Indonesia, Singapore, and the US. Comfortable with async communication and timezone overlap.
scripts.translation: Tentu! Kerja remote X tahun dengan klien di Indonesia, Singapura, dan AS. Nyaman komunikasi async dan timezone overlap.

scripts.en: I use Slack, Notion, GitHub. Proactive with daily updates and thorough documentation.
scripts.translation: Saya pakai Slack, Notion, GitHub. Proaktif update harian dan dokumentasi lengkap.

scripts.en: We're in US Eastern Time. Can you work our hours?
scripts.translation: Kami di AS Eastern Time. Bisa kerja jam kami?

scripts.en: I'm in WIB, UTC+7, 12 hours behind Eastern Time. Available 8 PM to 12 AM WIB equals your 8 AM to 12 PM Eastern. Flexible for important meetings.
scripts.translation: Saya WIB, UTC+7, selisih 12 jam. Available jam 8 sampai 12 malam WIB sama dengan jam 8 sampai 12 pagi Eastern. Fleksibel untuk meeting penting.

scripts.en: How do you handle payments?
scripts.translation: Bagaimana cara bayar?

scripts.en: Monthly invoices with detailed hours. I accept Wise, PayPal, or bank transfer. For new clients: 30% deposit upfront, 70% on delivery. Net-15 terms.
scripts.translation: Invoice bulanan dengan detail jam. Saya terima Wise, PayPal, atau transfer bank. Klien baru: deposit 30% di muka, 70% saat deliver. Net-15.

scripts.en: What contract are you looking for?
scripts.translation: Kontrak seperti apa yang kamu cari?

scripts.en: Monthly retainer — X hours per month, minimum 3-month commitment. 14-day notice to end. All code and IP transfers to you.
scripts.translation: Monthly retainer — X jam per bulan, komitmen minimal 3 bulan. Pemberitahuan 14 hari untuk berhenti. Semua kode dan IP milik Anda.

scripts.en: PR number 42 ready for review.
scripts.translation: PR nomor 42 siap di-review.

scripts.en: Heads down on API refactor. Update at end of day.
scripts.translation: Fokus refactor API. Update akhir hari.

scripts.en: Out of office tomorrow. Name covers urgent.
scripts.translation: Tidak ada besok. Nama cover urgent.

scripts.en: Escalating — production DB showing degradation.
scripts.translation: Eskalasi — DB production mulai degradasi.

scripts.en: Signing off. All tasks on track. See you tomorrow!
scripts.translation: Selesai hari ini. Semua task on track. Sampai besok!

scripts.en: I believe this approach will work best.
scripts.translation: Saya yakin pendekatan ini akan paling berhasil.

scripts.en: Let me check.
scripts.translation: Saya cek dulu.

scripts.en: I architected and designed the system.
scripts.translation: Saya mendesain dan membangun sistem.
